title: CommandItems
description: Command Items (or item commands) allows you to generate items with commands linked to them using NBT data.
body:
# 🪄 CommandItems

Create custom items that execute commands when right-clicked — perfect for mapmakers, admins, or creative setups!

---

## 📹 Showcase
<iframe width="1483" height="834" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/VqHaE81nKuA" title="CommandItems | Showcase" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## 🔧 Features
- Make items that **run commands** when used  
- Run commands as **player** or **console** (`c:<command>`)  
- Create, edit, or inspect command-bound items  
- Includes simple **placeholders** like `%player%`, `%world%`, `%x%`, and more  
- **Tab-completion** for all item names  
- Full **permission control** for creation and usage  

---

## 📜 Commands

| Command | Description |
|----------|--------------|
| `/createitem <item> <command>` | Creates an item that runs the specified command |
| `/applycommand <command>` | Applies a command to the item in your hand |
| `/info` | Displays any commands linked to the held item |

---

## 🧩 Placeholders

Use these placeholders inside your command strings:

| Placeholder    | Replaced With                         |
|----------------|----------------------------------------|
| `%player%`     | Player's name                          |
| `%uuid%`       | Player's UUID                          |
| `%world%`      | Player's current world                 |
| `%x%`          | Player's X coordinate (block)          |
| `%y%`          | Player's Y coordinate (block)          |
| `%z%`          | Player's Z coordinate (block)          |
| `%location%`   | Combined XYZ: `x y z`                  |
| `%health%`     | Player's current health (rounded)      |
| `%food%`       | Player's current food level            |
| `%gamemode%`   | Player's gamemode (`survival`, etc.)   |
| `%exp%`        | Player's total experience              |

---

## ✅ Permissions

| Node | Description |
|------|--------------|
| `command.item.create` | Lets you generate and edit command items |
| `command.item.use` | Allows using command items as a player |
| `command.item.use.console` | Allows running commands from items as console (**dangerous!**) |

---

🧱 **Works with:** Paper, Spigot, and Bukkit (1.13+)  
📂 Just drop the plugin in your `plugins/` folder — no setup required!
